codeReview.summary: Implementation adds ToolBehavioralHints struct with read_only_hint, destructive_hint, and idempotent_hint fields. Extends Tool trait with behavioral_hints() method (default impl) and annotates all 6 built-in tools with appropriate hints. Unit tests verify annotations for each tool.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature introduces a new trait extension pattern (adding behavioral_hints() to Tool trait with default implementation). AGENTS.md documents basic Rust patterns but doesn't cover trait extension patterns or behavioral classification. This is a gap in documented conventions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: swell-core/src/traits.rs:207 - behavioral_hints() method added with default implementation, but no convention docs cover this pattern

summary: Feature implementation is correct and complete. Added ToolBehavioralHints struct to swell-core with three behavioral classification fields. Extended Tool trait with behavioral_hints() default method. Annotated all 6 built-in tools (ReadFileTool, WriteFileTool, ShellTool, GitTool, FileEditTool, SearchTool) with appropriate hints. Added 6 unit tests verifying annotations. Build, tests, and lint all pass.
